0.2.0.description:
[FIX] remove empty emote that didn't exist in-game
[FIX] transform boolean rules into lambda rules

0.3.0.description:
[NEW] Turn weapons into a progressive item. This a togglable option in the YAML
[NEW] Turn pouch into a progressive ite. This a togglable option in the YAML
[NEW] Make the price of shop items customizable in the YAML
[NEW] Add the Hello emote to the item pool and remove the emote from the initial inventory
[NEW] The name of many locations are now clearer (ex: "Left Side Chest" instead of "Loot Chest 3")

[FIX] Fix the index shit of locations, creating missmatches between the name of the location and it's actual in-game location starting from Stoneheart City
[FIX] The conditions to access the chest in Water Ways is fixed, as it should require all 4 doors to be unlocked (currently requires 1 door)
[FIX] The AP World now gives Holy Keys instead of Rare keys
[FIX] The name of Spirits are matched with the actual spirit in-game (The order was incorrect)
